case_title: DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS VS. BRILLIANT BRIGHT CONSTRUCTION CO.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS AS TO DEFENDANT BRILLIANT BRIGHT CONSTRUCTION CO. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRILLIANT BRIGHT CONSTRUCTION CO. $250.00 PRINCIPAL, $21.19 INTEREST, $148.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $419.49, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
